title: Windows New User Account Created
description: Detects creation of a new Windows user account (EventID 4720), a common persistence technique.
author: SOC Team

qradar.rule_name: SOC-013: Windows New User Account Created

aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, username AS context_user, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4720%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%A user account was created%' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 5 MINUTES
